body.body: interpretive_edges migration UPDATE (layer=meaning_to_me) fires on every boot at 80ms. Already complete — add a check so it only runs if rows would actually change, or add a migrations marker. Low inertia. See #261.
body.title: Fix meaning_to_me migration UPDATE firing every restart (#261)
body.result: cortex.py: added _migrations table at _init_db() start; guarded meaning_to_me layer UPDATE behind migration marker 'meaning_to_me_layer_tag' — UPDATE now runs once instead of every boot (was 80ms per restart due to LIKE scan). Syntax OK.
